verdictSummary: Four PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims, all sourced from /academic-institute/education/medical/medical-student-rotations, are quote-backed with definite-offer language including a dedicated HMObserver inbox and an explicit international physician/resident/medical-student pathway via the Global Education Office. No GME/careers/fellowship over-promotion. Tier coverage complete across all three tiers. Some claimId collisions across sources noted as unresolveds for downstream dedupe.
unresolveds: claimId collisions: c1, c2, c3, c4 are each reused across /education and /medical-student-rotations sources. Downstream merger must namespace by sourceUrl.

Source family for /medical-student-rotations is tagged OTHER but content is functionally a medical-student-rotations/observership page. Reclassification recommended but not blocking since URL path is unambiguous.
Volunteer page (hm-vol-02) marked HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED on a NOT_STATED_ON_SOURCE quote — correctly avoided labeling absence as refusal.
unfollowedSignals: Global Education Office is named as the international observer pathway but no separate Global Education Office page was captured — A4 narrow recovery candidate for contact details and eligibility specifics.
Bookout Center virtual hospital training facility not deep-read for public-access scope.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: /medical-student-rotations directs international physicians, residents, and medical students to the Global Education Office, but that office's page (with eligibility, duration, fee, ECFMG/USMLE/visa requirements, contact) was not captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch: houstonmethodist.org Global Education Office and HMObserver landing/contact pages. Do not broaden crawl.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: Rotations page confirms offering but omits duration, fees, ECFMG/USMLE requirements, application deadlines, and accepting specialties (claims c6, c7, c8, a2_c3, a2_c4, a2_c5 all NOT_STATED).
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch: any sub-pages under /academic-institute/education/medical/ enumerating rotation specialties, fees, durations, and eligibility forms.
